name: spec-feature-mode
responsibility: Modifications to spec.md for feature mode. Adds code awareness (read existing codebase to avoid interface conflicts) and triggers Critic impact audit after spec review.

input_schema.description: Prompt-level: spec.md reads feature-scoped discover artifact at specs/features/feat-xxx/discover.json + project profile for code context

output_schema.description: Module designs that are aware of existing codebase interfaces, avoiding conflicts

input_schema.description: Prompt-level: critic.md receives mode=feature flag and profile L1 (architecture layer) alongside spec artifact

touchedModules.description: Existing modules affected by the feature spec

dependencyDirectionChanges.description: New dependency edges or direction reversals

fields.name: touchedModules
fields.constraints: existing module names from profile L1

fields.name: overallSeverity
fields.constraints: block if any breakingChange is block

nfr_constraints.other: Impact audit results written to feature-scoped spec_review.json (REQ-011-AC-3). Greenfield mode: no impact audit (INV-001).
